---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool or enhancement
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description
A clear description of the feature you'd like to see added.

## Use Case
Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve?

## Proposed Solution
How do you think this should work?

## Tool/Package Information
If requesting a new tool to be added:
- Name:
- Homepage:
- Homebrew formula (if available):
- Why it's useful for AI development:

## Alternatives Considered
Have you considered any alternative solutions or workarounds?

## Additional Context
Any other information, screenshots, or examples.

## Priority
- [ ] Critical - blocks my workflow
- [ ] High - would significantly improve workflow
- [ ] Medium - nice to have
- [ ] Low - minor enhancement
